result:
Done. The change has been submitted as a **tracked change** (suggestion) in Overleaf. You can now open the project in Overleaf to review and accept/reject it:

- **Old text:** `Methods will be described here.`
- **New text:** `We use a comprehensive automated test suite covering 42 test cases across all CLI commands.`

It will appear in Overleaf's Review panel as a pending change for you to approve.
